title: Visual difference between templates (own vs monday) in automations
excerpt:
With the new Template Editor feature enabled is hard to see the difference between account custom template and templates from the monday library, when using automations to create a bord based on a template. 
It would be …

posts.author: Lieke (Lieke)
posts.cookedHtml:
With the new Template Editor feature enabled is hard to see the difference between account custom template and templates from the monday library, when using automations to create a bord based on a template.

It would be great once you open the dropdown you get a header:

  1. Custom/Account templates, showing all the templates created within the account.

and when you scroll passt the templates in the account a header saying:

  1. monday templates, showing the templates made available within in monday
